content.en:
"The method of dual-universe transcendence, those supremes of the twelve universe epochs fought this idea, in case the fusion of the two universes failed, this universe would be completely destroyed. Originally, I wanted to help my relatives avoid the catastrophe of the universe, but now it seems that this plan must be abandoned!"

Ye Tian thought.

Of course, he doesn't know when the two universes collide or maybe not.

After all, no one knows what the situation is in the chaos, in case the chaos powerhouse or force behind it declines, and this plan runs aground, then there is no dual-universe transcendence plan.

But this possibility is not very large, Ye Tian naturally can't expect hope to luck.

He had to be prepared!

"The hope still lies in the body, the second deity is useless, the potential is limited, and in the desolate realm, you can also exert the combat power of the top supreme, once you leave the desolate realm, it is an ordinary top celestial venerable! "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But he won't tell this matter personally, otherwise it would be easy to reveal his secret.

After all, such a secret is not something that ordinary people can know, it must have obtained an amazing inheritance, and it is known from the inheritance, in case there is a supreme to investigate him, or to spy on him, he will be in danger.

In fact, he was more worried about the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, in case he attracted the attention of those Supremes because of revealing this matter, it would definitely not be a good thing for him.

Therefore, the news is spread in a special way, but it cannot make others suspect him.

"Just use this second deity to deliver the news, and in the future, the second deity will always guard the wasteland and no longer go out, so that the possibility of leakage will be eliminated!"

Immediately, Ye Tian's second deity left the wasteland.

Next, Ye Tian went to the trading cities of the Universe Clans, and traded the Twin Universe Transcendence Methods one by one in the form of transactions.

Soon, the method of dual universe detachment spread, and then linked to the practices and experiences of those supreme beings in the twelve universe eras, it was easy for people to connect with the method of dual universe detachment.

All of a sudden, the universe shook.

Protoss.

The First Divine Lord was looking at the information that had just come from his subordinates—

"The method of transcendence of the two universes, this ......"

The First Divine Lord was shocked.

This method of detachment is very detailed, and very similar to the practice of the Supreme Beings of the Twelve Ages.

"Suppressing the origin of the universe, I finally understand. Damn, those Supreme Treasures of the Twelve Universe Eras should be used to repair the broken Chaos Arcana. On that day, after the Chaos Arcana recovered, that force shocked the universe, and then the power of the universe origin was exhausted, and it must have been suppressed by that Chaos Arcana. It is precisely because the origin of the universe is suppressed that the Lord of the Yuan Gu can exert his true strength, and he will attack us, killing hundreds of Supremes in one blow!"

The First Divine Lord suddenly realized.

"Judging from the current situation, the plan of those supremes in the Twelve Universe Era is only halfway through, and it is estimated that the next thing is to accumulate strength, strengthen your strength, and then wait for the two universes to collide together. This plan does not seem to affect the Wan clans, but if these supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras want to expand their luck, they may attack the Wan clans. "The first god said.

Thinking of this possibility, the First Divine Lord hurriedly contacted the First Demon Lord.

The Protoss and the Demon Race were very close to each other, so the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord met quickly.

"First Demon Lord, you should also know about the Dual Universe Transcendence Method, right?"

The First Divine Lord asked.

"I know, although I don't know who spread it, but it should be true. Unexpectedly, the true purpose of those supreme beings in the Twelve Universe Eras to avoid the reincarnation of the Great Universe Destruction to the Thirteenth Universe Era is to use the method of Dual Universe Detachment to transcend!" the First Demon Lord sighed.

"Hmph, these Supremes have already lived, if there is no hope of transcendence, why should they live another cosmic era? Now I finally understand that they still have the hope of transcendence, and the success rate is greater than the two transcendence methods we know. "The first god said.

"What should we do now?In terms of strength, we are definitely not their opponents, but if they are no longer bound by the agreement in another 90,000 years, will they kill us?"

"We won't kill us, but it's very likely that we will attack all races and grab territory. Previously, the Lord of the Yuan Gu only killed hundreds of Supremes, but did not kill other Supremes, and the attack was for fear that the Supreme would kill too much, causing the Universe Origin to recover more power, so they were worried that their Chaos Arcana would no longer be able to suppress the Universe Origin, causing their plan to fail. The First Divine Lord guessed.

"Well, it should be this reason, we didn't understand it before, but now that we know the method of dual universe transcendence, everything is clear. But how do we deal with it now?"

The First Demon Lord frowned.

"Two countermeasures, one is that all races unite to contend with those supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, but it is unlikely that this will be counterproductive. You and I are very clear about the strength of those supremes, and it is not something that can be competed with by a large number of supremes. The second countermeasure is to sabotage their plans. "The first god said.

"Sabotage the plan, but the plans of those supremes in the Twelve Universe Era are also good for us, after all, you and I don't have the slightest hope of detachment, and now once their plan is completed, we will have a glimmer of hope!"

The First Demon Lord somewhat disagreed with this approach.

"No, I'm talking about pretending to sabotage their plans, such as pretending to destroy the Chaos Arcana to suppress the origin of the universe, so as to gain some benefits for us. After all, once the Chaos Arcana could no longer suppress the Universe Origin, their plan would be tantamount to failure. So, in order to get the plan done, they should be able to accede to some of our requests. "

The first god is the main way.

"Yes, this way it works. But we still need to discuss it with the other universe clans, otherwise it will be difficult for our two races alone to threaten the forces of the twelve universe eras!"

The First Demon Lord.

"Good!"

The First Divine Lord nodded.

----------

Yuangu Palace.

The Lord of the Ancient and the other Supremes were very angry, and they also knew that the method of Dual Universe Transcendence was circulating among all the races of the universe.

"Who the hell leaked it? Before, we promised not to leak this plan, and we were not even allowed to mention half a word during the meeting, but now the plan has been completely leaked!!

The Lord of the Ancient said angrily.
